en: And Job again took up his discourse, and said:
zh: 約伯繼續他的講論，說：

en: "As God lives, who has taken away my right, and the Almighty, who has made my soul bitter,
zh: “永活的 神奪去我的公理， 全能者使我心中痛苦。

en: as long as my breath is in me, and the spirit of God is in my nostrils,
zh: 只要我的生命還在我裡面， 神賜我的氣息還在我鼻孔裡，

en: my lips will not speak falsehood, and my tongue will not utter deceit.
zh: 我的嘴唇決不說不義之言， 我的舌頭也不講詭詐之語。

en: Far be it from me to say that you are right; till I die I will not put away my integrity from me.
zh: 我絕對不以你們為是， 我到死也不放棄我的純全；

en: I hold fast my righteousness and will not let it go; my heart does not reproach me for any of my days.
zh: 我堅守我的義決不放鬆， 我一生的日子我的心必不責備我。

en: "Let my enemy be as the wicked, and let him who rises up against me be as the unrighteous.
zh: 願我的敵人如惡人一般， 願那起來攻擊我的像不義的人一樣。

en: For what is the hope of the godless when God cuts him off, when God takes away his life?
zh: 不敬虔的人被剪除， 神奪去他性命的時候還有甚麼指望呢？

en: Will God hear his cry when distress comes upon him?
zh: 患難臨到他身上的時候， 神會垂聽他的哀求嗎？

en: Will he take delight in the Almighty? Will he call upon God at all times?
zh: 他以全能者為樂， 時時求告 神嗎？

en: I will teach you concerning the hand of God; what is with the Almighty I will not conceal.
zh: 我藉 神的能力教導你們， 我不向你們隱瞞全能者的事。

en: Behold, all of you have seen it yourselves; why then have you become altogether vain?
zh: 你們都親自見過， 你們為甚麼成了這麼虛妄呢？

en: "This is the portion of a wicked man with God, and the heritage that oppressors receive from the Almighty:
zh: 這是惡人從 神所得的分， 強暴的人從全能者所得的業。

en: If his children are multiplied, it is for the sword, and his descendants have not enough bread.
zh: 即使他的兒女增多，還是被刀劍所殺， 他的子孫也必永不得飽食；

en: Those who survive him the pestilence buries, and his widows do not weep.
zh: 他的遺族在死人中埋葬， 他的寡婦也都不哀哭。

en: Though he heap up silver like dust, and pile up clothing like clay,
zh: 他雖然堆積銀子如塵沙， 預備衣服如泥土，

en: he may pile it up, but the righteous will wear it, and the innocent will divide the silver.
zh: 他儘管預備，義人卻要穿上； 他的銀子，無辜的人也要瓜分。

en: He builds his house like a moth's, like a booth that a watchman makes.
zh: 他建造房屋如蜘蛛結網， 又如守望者所搭的棚。

en: He goes to bed rich, but will do so no more; he opens his eyes, and his wealth is gone.
zh: 他雖然躺下的時候富有，卻不再這樣； 他一張開雙眼，財富就不在了。

en: Terrors overtake him like a flood; in the night a whirlwind carries him off.
zh: 驚恐必如眾水追上他， 暴風在夜間把他颳去。

en: The east wind lifts him up and he is gone; it sweeps him out of his place.
zh: 東風把他吹起，他就消逝； 又把他捲起，離開原來的地方。

en: It hurls at him without pity; he flees from its power in headlong flight.
zh: 神射擊他，毫不留情， 他甚願快快逃脫 神的手。

en: It claps its hands at him and hisses at him from its place.
zh: 有人向他拍掌， 發噝聲趕他離開原來的地方。”
